# Artifact Registry

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/artifacts/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Artifact Registry
=================

Artifact Registry is a repository service for storing, sharing, and managing software development packages.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/artifacts/)

#### Get Started

[Learn about Artifact Registry](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/artifacts/overview.htm#overview "Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Artifact Registry is a repository service for storing, sharing, and managing software development packages.")

[Review key concepts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/artifacts/concepts.htm#concepts "Review concepts and terms related to Artifact Registry.")

[Access Artifact Registry](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/artifacts/overview.htm#ways-to-access "Use any of the following options to access Artifact Registry.")

#### Prerequisites

[Create IAM policies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/artifacts/iam-policies.htm#policies "Create Identity and Access Management (IAM) policies to control who has access to Artifact Registry resources and to control the type of access for each group of users.")

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Oracle communities](https://community.oracle.com/tech/apps-infra/categories/18430-cloud-infrastructure)

#### Manage Repositories

[Create repositories](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/artifacts/create-repo.htm#create-repo "Create a repository in Artifact Registry to store non-container generic artifacts or blobs.")

[Delete repositories](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/artifacts/delete-repo.htm#delete-repo "Delete an empty repository in Artifact Registry.")

[Get repository events](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/artifacts/events.htm#repository-events "When you create, update, list, delete or change compartment of a repository, Artifact Registry creates an event.")

#### Developer Tools

[Artifacts and Container Images API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/registry/)

[Generic Artifacts Content API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/generic/)

[Artifacts CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/artifacts.html)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

#### Manage Artifacts

[Upload artifacts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/artifacts/upload-artifact.htm#upload-artifact "The method that you use to upload an artifact to Artifact Registry depends on the size of the artifact file.")

[Download artifacts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/artifacts/download-artifact.htm#download-artifact "Download an artifact to a local environment.")

[Delete artifacts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/artifacts/delete-artifact.htm#delete-artifact "Delete artifacts from an Artifact Registry repository.")

[Search for artifacts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/artifacts/search-artifacts.htm#search-artifacts "Search for artifacts in Artifact Registry by entering the first few characters of the artifact name or version in the search field.")

[Get artifact events](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/artifacts/events.htm#artifact-events "When you upload, update, delete, or get details of an artifact, or when you list the artifacts of a repository, Artifact Registry creates an event.")

#### Support

[Get help and contact support](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/epmos/faces/MosIndex.jspx)

---

# Compute

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Compute
=======

Use the Compute service to create bare metal compute or virtual machine (VM) instances to deploy and run your applications.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/compute/)

#### Get Started

[Launching Your First Linux Instance](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/tutorials/first-linux-instance/overview.htm "In this tutorial, perform the steps to create and connect to an OCI Compute instance. After your instance is up and running, optionally create and attach a block volume.")

[Launching Your First Windows Instance](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/tutorials/first-windows-instance/overview.htm "In this tutorial, perform the steps to create and connect to an OCI Compute Windows instance. After your instance is up and running, optionally create and attach a block volume.")

[Working with Instances](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/instances.htm "Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Compute lets you provision and manage compute hosts, known as instances. You can create instances as needed to meet your compute and application requirements. After you create an instance, you can access it securely from your computer, restart it, attach and detach volumes, and terminate it when you're done with it.")

[Compute shapes](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/References/computeshapes.htm)

[High Performance Computing](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/References/high-performance-compute.htm "High Performance Computing (HPC) performs complex calculations and processes data faster than traditional Compute. HPC uses bare metal servers, ultralow latency cluster networking, high-performance storage options, and parallel file systems. This infrastructure enables parallel processing for compute-intensive workloads such as artificial intelligence, deep learning, data analysis, scientific simulations, and any other highly intensive workload.")

[Set up notifications](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/contextual-notifications-compute.htm "You can get messages when something happens with a compute instance. Use contextual notifications in the Console to create event rules and alarms for an instance. Quick start templates are available.")

[Set up disaster recovery](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Concepts/computeoverview.htm#disaster-recovery)

[Product page](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/compute/)

#### Images and OSs

[Create a custom image](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/managingcustomimages.htm "You can create a custom image of an instance's boot disk and use it to launch other instances. Instances you launch from your image include the customizations, configuration, and software installed when you created the image.")

[Export and import images across tenancies or regions](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/imageimportexport.htm "You can move Compute instances to and from tenancies, regions, and other cloud providers using custom images and image import/export.")

[Use a platform image](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/References/images.htm)

#### Support

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

#### Connect to Instances

[Connect to a Linux instance](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/connect-to-linux-instance.htm "You can connect to a running Linux instance by using a Secure Shell (SSH) connection.")

[Connect to a Windows instance](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/connect-to-windows-instance.htm "You connect to a Windows instance by using a Remote Desktop connection. Most Windows systems include a Remote Desktop client by default.")

[Troubleshoot SSH connections](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/troubleshooting-ssh-connection.htm "If you're unable to connect to a compute instance using SSH, review the following troubleshooting error messages and suggestions to resolve the issue.")

[Manage SSH key pairs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/managingkeypairs.htm)

#### Manage Capacity

[Reserve capacity](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/reserve-capacity.htm "Capacity reservations allow you to reserve instances in advance so that the capacity is available for your workloads when you need it.")

[Use preemptible capacity](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Concepts/preemptible.htm)

[Scale the cores and memory for an instance](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/resizinginstances.htm)

[Create instances with burstable performance](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/References/burstable-instances.htm)

[Dedicated Virtual Machine Hosts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Concepts/dedicatedvmhosts.htm)

#### Developer Tools

[SDKs, CLI, and API for Compute](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/developing-with-compute.htm "You can use Oracle Cloud Infrastructure developer resources to perform tasks programmatically with the Compute service.")

[Overview of SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/domain/dev-community/category/15686-platform?tags=cloud-applications,cloud-infrastructure)

#### Manage Groups of Instances

[Automatically scale groups of instances (autoscaling)](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/autoscalinginstancepools.htm "Autoscaling lets you automatically adjust the number or the lifecycle state of compute instances in an instance pool. This helps you provide consistent performance for your end users during periods of high demand, and helps you reduce your costs during periods of low demand.")

[Create templates for instances (instance configurations)](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/creatinginstanceconfig.htm)

[Manage instances in a group (instance pools)](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/creatinginstancepool.htm "Use instance pools to create and manage multiple compute instances within the same region as a group.")

#### Troubleshooting

[Troubleshoot using a serial or VNC console connection](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/References/serialconsole.htm)

[Troubleshoot Oracle Cloud Agent plugins](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/manage-plugins-troubleshooting.htm)

[Display the serial console history](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/displayingconsole.htm "You can capture and display recent serial console data for an instance. The data includes configuration messages that occur when the instance boots, such as kernel and BIOS messages, and is useful for checking the status of the instance or diagnosing and troubleshooting problems.")

[Perform a diagnostic reboot](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/diagnostic-reboot.htm)

---

# Vision

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Vision
======

Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Vision is a serverless, multi-tenant service, accessible using the Console, or over REST APIs. You can upload images to detect and classify objects in them. If you have lots of images, you can process them in batch using asynchronous API endpoints.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/data-flow/)

#### Get Started

[Overview of Vision](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/overview.htm "Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Vision is a serverless, multi-tenant service, accessible using the Console, REST APIs, SDK, or CLI.")

[About Vision Policies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/about_vision_policies.htm "Learn about Vision's resource policies including API permissions.")

[Live Lab](https://apexapps.oracle.com/pls/apex/dbpm/r/livelabs/view-workshop?wid=931)

[Product page](https://www.oracle.com/artificial-intelligence/vision/)

#### Prerequisites

[Vision Policy Quick Set Up](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/policies_quick_set_up.htm "You can use a template to quickly set up Vision policies to control who has access to the service, and the type of access for each group of users.")

#### Support

[Getting help](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/support/getting-help.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

[Contact us using Cloud Customer Connect](https://cloudcustomerconnect.oracle.com/pages/home)

#### Developer Tools

[Vision API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/vision/)

[SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

#### How To

[Analyzing with the API](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/api_models.htm "You can use the Vision API to analyze images and documents individually or images in batch.")

[Building a Custom Model](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/custom_model_calling_stored_video.htm#custom_model_build "Build custom models in Vision to extract insights from images without needing data scientists.")

#### Community

[Oracle AI and Data Science Blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/ai-and-datascience/)

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://community.oracle.com/tech/apps-infra/categories/18430-cloud-infrastructure)

#### Tutorials

[Tutorials](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/tutorials/index.htm "This set of tutorials guides you through a specific, simple use case to get you started with Vision quickly and easily.")

[Live Lab](https://apexapps.oracle.com/pls/apex/dbpm/r/livelabs/view-workshop?wid=931)

#### Concepts

[Batch Processing](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/batch_processing.htm "When dealing with archival media, or analyzing many images that don't require an immediate response to a user, you might want to process the images asynchronously in Vision.")

[Custom Image Analysis Models](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/custom_image_analysis_models.htm "Vision provides custom image analysis models that let you find and tag objects, text, and entire scenes in images, that are specific to your scenario.")

[Pretrained Document AI Models](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/pretrained_doc_ai_models.htm "Vision provides pretrained document AI models that let you organize and extract text and structure from business documents.")

[Pretrained Image Analysis Models](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/pretrained_image_analysis_models.htm "Vision provides pretrained image analysis AI models that let you to find and tag objects, text, and entire scenes in images.")

[Data Handling](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/data-handling.htm "Vision's data handling.")

[Face Detection](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/pretrained_image_analysis_models.htm#pretrained_image_analysis_face "Vision can detect and recognize faces in an image.")

[Stored Video Analysis](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/stored_video_analysis.htm "Vision lets you process stored videos to identify labels, classify images, and detect objects and faces in each frame.")

[Stream Video Analysis](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/video-stream-processing-top.htm "Stream Video Analysis is a fully managed, GPU-quickened real-time video analytics service on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI). It process live RTSP streams to deliver real-time insights using AI capabilities.")
  **New**

#### Troubleshooting

[Troubleshooting](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/troubleshooting.htm "Use troubleshooting information to identify and address common issues that can occur while working with Vision.")

[Limits](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/vision/using/limits.htm "Common limits for Vision, and those limits specific to Document AI and Image analysis models.")

# What is DevOps

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

DevOps
======

DevOps is a continuous integration/continuous delivery (CI/CD) service that automates the delivery and deployment of software to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) compute platforms.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/devops/)

#### Get Started

[Video: Overview](https://apexapps.oracle.com/pls/apex/f?p=44785:265:0:::265:P265_CONTENT_ID:32478)

[Learn about DevOps](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/devops_overview.htm "The Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) DevOps service is an end-to-end, continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) platform for developers.")

[Get started with DevOps](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/getting_started.htm "Learn how to get started with the DevOps service, and the prerequisites for using it.")

[DevOps IAM policies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/devops_iampolicies.htm#policy-examples "DevOps policies required for using various DevOps resources such as code repositories, build pipelines and deployment pipelines.")

[DevOps examples](https://github.com/oracle-devrel/oci-devops-examples)

#### Manage Environments

[Create environments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/environments.htm "An DevOps environment is the target platform for your software. You create references to different destination environments for DevOps deployment.")

[Update environments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/edit_environment.htm "Update the details of an environment, such as its name and description.")

[Delete environments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/delete_environment.htm "Delete an environment in the DevOps service.")

#### Manage Artifacts

[Create artifacts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/artifacts.htm "DevOps artifacts are referenced in a pipeline stage for automated deployment to the target environment. They are used to specify software package versions for deployment.")

[Update artifacts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/edit_artifact.htm "Update the reference information of an artifact.")

[Delete artifacts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/delete_artifact.htm "Remove an artifact reference in the DevOps service.")

#### Support

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

#### Manage DevOps Projects

[Create projects](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/create_project.htm "Create a DevOps project to group the resources required to implement a CI/CD workflow.")

[Update projects](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/edit_project.htm "Modify the information of a DevOps project.")

[Delete projects](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/delete_project.htm "Delete a DevOps project along with its resources.")

#### Manage Build Pipelines

[Create build pipelines](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/create_buildpipeline.htm "Create a build pipeline to define the build process.")

[Build specification](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/build_specs.htm "The build specification contains build steps and settings that the build pipeline uses to run a build.")

[Update build pipelines](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/edit_buildpipeline.htm "Update information such as the name and description of a build pipeline.")

[Run build pipelines](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/run_build.htm "Trigger the build process by manually running a DevOps build pipeline.")

#### Developer Tools

[DevOps API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/devops/)

[DevOps CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/devops.html)

[DevOps plug-in for Jenkins](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/devops_plugin.htm "This topic provides information about installing, configuring, and using the Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) DevOps plugin for Jenkins.")

[DevOps reference architecture](https://docs.oracle.com/en/solutions/ci-cd-pipe-oci-devops/index.html#GUID-E9FFE063-2899-40B8-B01E-DB222870C9E0)

[Oracle Cloud Free Tier](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/free/)

#### Manage Code Repositories

[Create repository](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/create_repo.htm "Create code repositories in the DevOps service.")

[Create connection](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/create_connection.htm "Create a connection to external repositories such as GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket Cloud, Visual Builder Studio, Bitbucket Server, and GitLab Server.")

[Clone repository](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/clone_repo.htm "You can clone the code repository to create a local copy on your computer, add or remove files, commit changes, and work on different branches by using Git operations.")

[Manage pull requests](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/manage_pullrequest.htm "A pull request (PR) or request to merge is a workflow in software development that facilitates code changes to be merged from the local branch to the main project branch after review and approval.")

#### Manage Deployment Pipelines

[Create pipelines](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/deployment_pipelines.htm "A deployment pipeline holds the requirements that must be satisfied to deliver a set of artifacts to the target environment.")

[Deployment configuration](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/deployment_specs.htm "The deployment configuration file defines the artifacts to be downloaded to the instance and the location where the artifacts must be copied. The configuration file also specifies the sequence of commands for deployment.")

[Update pipelines](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/edit_pipeline.htm "Update deployment pipeline information.")

[Run pipelines](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/devops/using/run_pipeline.htm "Deploy applications by running a DevOps deployment pipeline.")

#### Community

[Product page](https://www.oracle.com/devops/)

[DevOps resources](https://www.oracle.com/devops/devops-service/)

[A DevOps Engineer's Guide to OCI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Reference/getting-started-as-devops.htm)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/domain/dev-community/category/15686-platform?tags=cloud-applications,cloud-infrastructure)

# API Gateway

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

API Gateway
===========

The API Gateway service enables you to create governed HTTP/S interfaces for other services, including OCI Functions, Kubernetes Engine, and Container Registry. API Gateway also provides policy enforcement such as authentication and rate-limiting to HTTP/S endpoints.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/api-gateway/)

#### Get Started

[QuickStart](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayquickstartsetupcreatedeploy.htm "Find out how to get started quickly with API Gateway.")

[Learn about API Gateway](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Concepts/apigatewayoverview.htm)

[Review key concepts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Concepts/apigatewayconcepts.htm "Find out how about key concepts you need to understand when using API Gateway.")

[Prepare for API Gateway](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Concepts/apigatewayprerequisites.htm "Find out about the high-level prerequisites for using API Gateway.")

[Product page](https://www.oracle.com/cloud-native/api-management/)

#### Create APIs

[Create API gateways](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewaycreatinggateway.htm "Find out how to create an API gateway with the API Gateway service to process traffic from front-end clients and route it to back-end services.")

[Create API resources and descriptions](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewaycreatingapiobject.htm "Find out how to create an API resource with the API Gateway service that you can use to deploy an API on an API gateway.")

[Create API deployment specs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewaycreatingspecification.htm "Find out how to create an API specification (a machine-readable definition of an API in JSON format) for use with API Gateway.")

[Create API deployment](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewaycreatingdeployment.htm "Find out how to deploy an API on an API gateway by creating an API deployment with the API Gateway service.")

#### Manage APIs

[List API gateways and deployments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewaylisting.htm "Find out how to list existing API gateways with the API Gateway service.")

[Update API gateways and deployments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayupdating.htm "Find out how to modify API gateways that you previously created with the API Gateway service.")

[Move API gateways and deployments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewaymovingresources.htm "Find out how to move API gateways between compartments with the API Gateway service.")

[Delete API gateways and deployments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewaydeleting.htm "Find out how to delete API gateways that you previously created with the API Gateway service.")

#### Support

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

#### Observe APIs

[Add logging to deployments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayaddinglogpolicies.htm "Find out how to add logging policies to API specifications that you previously created with API Gateway.")

[API Gateway Metrics](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Reference/apigatewaymetrics.htm "Find out about the metrics emitted by API Gateway.")

[Troubleshooting](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewaytroubleshooting.htm "Find out how to troubleshoot problems with API Gateway, and possible solutions to common issues.")

#### Call and Parameterize APIs

[Call APIs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayinvokingdeployedapi.htm "Find out how to call an API that you have previously deployed on an API gateway with the API Gateway service.")

[Add path parameters](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayaddingparamswildcards.htm "Find out how to add path parameters and wildcards to route paths in API deployment specifications with API Gateway.")

[Add context variables](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewaycontextvariables.htm "Find out how to use parameters in API calls using API Gateway context variables.")

#### Secure APIs

[Set up custom domains and TLS certs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewaysettingupcustomdomainscerts.htm "Find out how to set up custom domains and TLS certificates with API Gateway.")

[Add CORS support](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayaddingcorssupport.htm "Find out how to use a request policy to add CORS support to API deployments with API Gateway.")

[Customize trust stores](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewaysettingupcustomcertificateauthorities.htm "Find out how to add Certificate Authorities (CAs) and CA bundles to custom trust stores with API Gateway.")

[Add mTLS support](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayaddingmtlssupport.htm "Find out how to use a request policy to add mTLS support to API deployments with API Gateway.")

#### Authenticate and Authorize

[Add authentication and authorization](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayaddingauthzauthn.htm "Find out how to add authentication and authorization functionality to API gateways with the API Gateway service.")

[Use authorizer functions](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayusingauthorizerfunction.htm "Find out how to use single-argument authorizer functions and access tokens to add authentication and authorization functionality to API gateways with the API Gateway service.")

[Use OAuth 2.0 (and OpenID Connect), Remote JWKS, or Static keys](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayusingjwttokens.htm)

[Add multiple authentication servers](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayaddingmultipleauthenticationservers.htm)

#### Developer Tools

[API Gateway API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/api-gateway/latest/Api)

[API Gateway CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/api-gateway.html)

[SDKs and the CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/sdks.htm)

[Cloud Shell](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/API/Concepts/devcloudshellintro.htm)

#### Add Back Ends

[Add HTTP/HTTPS URL back ends](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayusinghttpbackend.htm "Find out how to create an API deployment to access HTTP and HTTPS URLs with API Gateway.")

[Add Function back ends](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayusingfunctionsbackend.htm "Find out how to create an API deployment with API Gateway that exposes serverless functions defined in OCI Functions.")

[Add stock response back ends](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayaddingstockresponses.htm "Find out how to define a path to a stock response back end with API Gateway.")

[Add logout back ends](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayaddinglogoutbackends.htm "Find out how to define a logout back end with API Gateway.")

[Add login back ends](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayaddingloginbackends.htm "Find out how to define an OAuth 2.0 login back end with API Gateway.")

#### Add Request and Response Policies

[Add request and response policies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayaddingrequestpolicies.htm "Find out how to control the behavior of API deployments by adding request and response policies to API specifications that you previously created with API Gateway.")

[Add request validation](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayaddingrequestvalidation.htm "Find out how to prevent invalid requests being sent to back-end services, by validating incoming requests against a validation request policy with API Gateway.")

[Limit request numbers](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewaylimitingbackendaccess.htm "Find out how to use a request policy to limit the number of requests sent to back-end services with API Gateway.")

[Cache responses](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewayresponsecaching.htm "Find out how to use response caching request and response policies to reduce the number of requests sent to back-end services with API Gateway.")

[Transform requests and responses](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewaymodifyingresponsesrequests.htm "Find out how to modify incoming requests and outgoing responses being sent to and from back-end services with API Gateway.")

#### Troubleshooting

[Troubleshoot API Gateway](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/APIGateway/Tasks/apigatewaytroubleshooting.htm "Find out how to troubleshoot problems with API Gateway, and possible solutions to common issues.")

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/domain/dev-community/category/15686-platform?tags=cloud-applications,cloud-infrastructure)

# Data Science

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Data Science
============

Data Science is a fully managed and serverless platform for data science teams to build, train, and manage machine learning models in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/data-science/)

#### Get Started

[Overview of the Data Science service](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/overview.htm "Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Data Science is a fully managed and serverless platform for data science teams to build, train, and manage machine learning models.")

[Data Scientists guide to OCI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Reference/getting-started-as-data-scientist.htm)

[What's new in ADS](https://accelerated-data-science.readthedocs.io/en/latest/release_notes.html)

[Provisioning and pricing](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/overview.htm#provisioning-pricing)

[Configure a tenancy with one-click Resource Manager](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/orm-configure-tenancy.htm "The Data Science service tenancy can be automatically configured, including OCI resources, using the OCI Resource Manager.")

[Create projects](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/create-projects.htm "Create a Data Science project to organize Data Science resources.")

[Using GPUs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/gpu-using.htm "To work with GPUs in Data Science, the tenancy needs a limit for that shape and the shape must be available in the region you want to use it in.")

[Product page](https://www.oracle.com/data-science/data-science-service/)

#### Build Models in Notebooks

[Authentication](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/use-notebook-sessions.htm#signing-oci-apis)

[Use code files](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/use-notebook-sessions.htm#code-files)

[Configure a private endpoint](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/pe-network.htm "Configure private access for notebook sessions and model deployments in Data Science using private endpoints.")

[Configure runtime options](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/notebook-runtime.htm "When you create a notebook session in Data Science, you can add custom environment variable keys and Git repository URLs to be used in notebook sessions.")

[Create notebooks](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/create-notebook-sessions.htm "Create a Data Science notebook session to access a JupyterLab interface that uses a customizable compute, storage, and network configuration.")

[View notebook metrics](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/metrics-view-notebook.htm "View the default metric charts using a notebook session's detail page in the Data Science service in the Console.")

[Connect to data](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/connect-to-data.htm "You can connect to data in several different ways.")

[Connect to Data Flow](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/connect-to-data-flow-studio.htm "You can connect to Data Flow and run an Apache Spark application from a Data Science notebook session. These sessions let you run interactive Spark workloads on a long lasting Data Flow cluster through an Apache Livy integration.")

#### Use AI Operators

[Overview](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/operators.htm "Operators are a suite of prepackaged solutions designed to address a wide range of data science needs")

[Quick Start](https://accelerated-data-science.readthedocs.io/en/latest/user_guide/quick_start/quick_start.html)

[AI Forecasting](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/operators-ai-forecast.htm "The AI Forecast Operator uses historical time series data to generate forecasts for future trends.")

[Anomaly Detection](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/operators-anomaly-detection.htm "The Anomaly Detection Operator is a low code tool for integrating anomaly detection into any enterprise application.")

#### ML Applications

[Overview](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/ml-apps-about.htm "ML Applications is a self-contained representation of ML use cases in Data Science.")

[Policies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/ml-apps-policy-setup.htm "Setting up ML Applications policies.")

[Project Setup](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/ml-apps-project-setup.htm "After creating the infrastructure for the sample ML Application, you can use the sample ML Application project as a template to start building, deploying, and operating your own ML Applications.")

#### Support

[Increase Data Science service limits](https://youtu.be/I_oeFppwybg)

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

#### Create and Save Models

[Construct a model artifact](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/models-prepare-artifact.htm "After a model is trained, you must create a model artifact to save with the model in a model catalog.")

[Create and save models](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/models_saving_catalog.htm "Create a model and save it to the model catalog by using the ADS SDK, OCI Python SDK, or the Console.")

[Use a large model artifact](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/model-large-artifacts.htm "The maximum size of a model artifact is 6 GB.")

#### Use Jobs

[Use your own container](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/jobs-byoc.htm "You can build and use a custom container (Bring Your Own Container or BYOC) for use when you create a job and job runs.")

[Build a job artifact](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/jobs-artifact.htm "Learn how create a job artifact to use in your jobs and job runs.")

[Create a job](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/jobs-create.htm "Create and run a job in Data Science.")

[Start a job run](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/job-runs.htm "Use Data Science job runs to apply various use cases to created jobs.")

[View job run metrics](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/metrics-jobs.htm "Use job metrics to improve performance.")

#### Use Pipelines

[Create a pipeline](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/pipelines-create.htm "Create a Data Science pipeline to run a task. You can create pipelines by using the ADS SDK, OCI Console, or the OCI SDK. Using ADS for creating pipelines can make developing the pipeline, the steps, and the dependencies easier. ADS supports reading and writing the pipeline to and from a YAML file. You can use ADS to view a visual representation of the pipeline. We recommend that you use ADS to create and manage pipeline using code.")

[Start a pipeline run](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/pipelines-runs-start.htm "Use a Data Science pipeline run to run the code of the pipeline steps according to the workflow defined in a pipeline.")

[Delete a pipeline run](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/pipelines-delete.htm "Delete a pipeline that's in a Succeeded, Failed, or Canceled state.")

[Bring Your Own Container](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/pipelines-v2-byoc-about.htm "Apart from defining pipeline steps based on jobs and scripts, you can use custom container images to define the step runtime.")

#### Developer Tools

[ADS SDK](https://accelerated-data-science.readthedocs.io/en/latest/index.html)

[ADS classes](https://accelerated-data-science.readthedocs.io/en/latest/modules.html)

[OCIFS SDK](https://ocifs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/)

[AutoMLx](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/automlx/latest/latest/index.html)

[ML Insights](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/ml-insights-docs/latest/ml-insights-documentation/html/index.html)

[ML Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/ml-monitoring-about.htm "Learn about ML Monitoring in Data Science.")

[Feature Store](https://feature-store-accelerated-data-science.readthedocs.io/en/latest/overview.html)

[Data Science API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/data-science/)

[Data Science CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/3.37.14/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/data-science.html)

#### Community

[Data Science newsletter subscription](https://go.oracle.com/LP=84731?elqCampaignId=109966&bn=odsn)

#### Discover Model Deployments

[Set up IAM policies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/model-dep-policies-auth.htm "You must create a group of users that are authorized to work with model deployments before you can deploy a model with a model deployment resource.")

[Use your own container](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/mod-dep-byoc.htm "Build and use a custom container (Bring Your Own Container or BYOC) as the runtime dependency when you create a model deployment.")

[Create model deployments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/model_dep_create.htm "After you store a Data Science model in the model catalog, it can be deployed as an HTTP endpoint as a model deployment.")

[Set up predict endpoints](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/model-dep-invoke.htm "Invoking a model deployment means that you can pass feature vectors or data samples to the inference endpoint, and then the model returns predictions for those data samples.")

[View model deployment metrics](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/metrics-model-deploy.htm#metrics-view-ds)

[Functions samples repository and Cloud Shell quick start](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/oracle-functions-announcing-samples-repository-and-quick-start-with-cloud-shell)

#### Explore Conda Environments

[Learn about condas](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/conda_understand_environments.htm "We recommend that you use conda environment to package Python dependencies inside notebook sessions.")

[Install condas](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/conda_installing.htm "To use conda environments in notebook sessions, you must install them.")

[Publish a conda to a bucket](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/conda_publishs_object.htm "Publish conda environments to Object Storage for use notebook sessions.")

[Select a kernel](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/conda_kernel.htm "Console kernels are selected in JupyterLab.")

[Copy a conda to another region](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/tutorial/move-conda-env/summary.htm)

[Conda notebook examples](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/conda_examples.htm "The notebook session environment includes various interactive example notebooks. You can use them to learn how to use the Data Science service. These examples are designed to help you understand its various features and solve business problems.")

#### Use AI Quick Actions

[Prerequisites](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/ai-quick-actions-set-up.htm "The prerequisites required to set yourself up for using AI Quick Actions.")

[About AI Quick Actions](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/ai-quick-actions-about.htm "AI Quick Actions makes it easy for you to browse foundation models, and deploy, fine-tune, and evaluate them inside Data Science notebooks.")

[Models](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/ai-quick-actions-models.htm "Learn about Model Explorer in AI Quick Actions.")

[Model Deployment](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/ai-quick-actions-model-deploy.htm "Follow these steps to deploy models with AI Quick Actions.")

[Fine-Tuning](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/ai-quick-actions-fine-tuning.htm "Fine-tuning is the process of taking a pretrained model and further training it on a domain-specific dataset to improve its knowledge and provide better responses in that domain.")

[Evaluations](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/data-science/using/ai-quick-actions-evaluations.htm "Evaluating the model performance with AI Quick Actions")

#### Troubleshooting

# Container Registry

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Container Registry
==================

Container Registry enables you to store, share, and manage container images (such as Docker images) in an Oracle-managed registry.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/registry/)

#### Get Started

[Learn about Container Registry](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Concepts/registryoverview.htm "Find out about Container Registry, an Oracle-managed registry that enables you to simplify your development to production workflow.")

[Review key concepts](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Concepts/registryconcepts.htm "Find out about the key concepts you need to understand before using Container Registry.")

[Access Container Registry](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Concepts/registryoverview.htm#access)

[Product page](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/cloud-native/container-registry/)

#### Prerequisites

[Create IAM policies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Concepts/registrypolicyrepoaccess.htm "Find out how to set up policies to control access to repositories in Container Registry, along with some examples of common policies.")

#### Support

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

#### Manage Repositories

[Create repositories](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Tasks/registrycreatingarepository.htm "Find out how to create a repository in Container Registry.")

[Delete repositories](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Tasks/registrydeletingrepos.htm "Find out how to delete a repository from Container Registry.")

[Move repositories between compartments](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Tasks/registrymovingrepos.htm "Find out how to move a repository in Container Registry from one compartment to another.")

#### Manage Images

[View images](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Tasks/registryviewingimagedetails.htm "Find out how to get details of an image in a repository in Container Registry.")

[Delete images](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Tasks/registrydeletingimages.htm "Find out how to delete an image from Container Registry.")

[Unversion images](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Tasks/registryuntaggingimages.htm "Find out how to unversion an image in Container Registry.")

[Retain images using retention policies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Tasks/registrymanagingimageretention.htm "Find out how to set up and use image retention policies with Container Registry.")

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/domain/dev-community/category/15686-platform?tags=cloud-applications,cloud-infrastructure)

#### Push and Pull Images

[Push images](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Tasks/registrypushingimagesusingthedockercli.htm "Find out how to push images to Container Registry using the Docker CLI.")

[Pull images](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Tasks/registrypullingimagesusingthedockercli.htm "Find out how to pull images from Container Registry using the Docker CLI.")

[Pull images when deploying to a Kubernetes cluster](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Tasks/registrypullingimagesfromocir.htm "Find out how to create a Docker registry secret. Also find out how to specify the image to pull from Container Registry (along with the Docker secret to use) during deployment of an application to a cluster.")

#### Secure Images

[Sign images for security](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Tasks/registrysigningimages_topic.htm "Find out how to sign images stored in Container Registry.")

[Scan images for vulnerabilities](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Registry/Tasks/registryscanningimagesforvulnerabilities.htm "Find out how to scan images in a repository for security vulnerabilities with Container Registry.")

#### Developer Tools

[Container Registry API](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/registry/latest)

[Container Registry CLI](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/tools/oci-cli/latest/oci_cli_docs/cmdref/artifacts.html)

Oracle APEX Documentation
=========================

Oracle APEX is a low-code development platform that enables you to build stunning, scalable, secure apps with world-class features that can be deployed anywhere.

### Oracle APEX

Use Oracle APEX to quickly develop and deploy compelling apps that solve real problems and provide immediate value. Oracle APEX provides you with all the tools you need to build apps in a single, extensible platform, which runs as a part of Oracle Database.

*   [Get an Environment](https://apex.oracle.com/en/learn/getting-started/)
    
*   [Release 26.1 Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/en/database/oracle/apex/26.1/index.html)
    
*   [Release 24.2 Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/en/database/oracle/apex/24.2/index.html)
    
*   [Release 24.1 Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/en/database/oracle/apex/24.1/index.html)
    
*   [Documentation Archives](https://www.oracle.com/database/technologies/appdev/apex_doc_archives.html)
    

### Oracle APEX in Oracle Cloud

Rapidly build and deploy scalable and secure applications in the cloud with the world's most popular enterprise low-code application platform.

*   [Getting Started with Oracle APEX in Oracle Cloud](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/paas/apex/index.html)

Oracle APEX in Oracle Cloud
===========================

Rapidly build and deploy scalable and secure applications in the cloud with the world's most popular enterprise low-code application platform.

Get Started
-----------

Use the following resources to get started with Oracle APEX in Oracle Cloud.

### Learn about APEX in Oracle Cloud

*   [About Oracle APEX Cloud Deployment Options](https://www.oracle.com/pls/topic/lookup?ctx=en/cloud/paas/apex&id=GSADD-GUID-ABFE6F3C-D391-4C67-A72A-2A3BD08F5220)
    
*   [About Oracle Cloud Infrastructure](https://www.oracle.com/pls/topic/lookup?ctx=en/cloud/paas/apex&id=GSADD-GUID-F7DC356F-33A2-49F6-B7E5-9106E1F4D698)
    
*   [Oracle APEX Web Browser Requirements](https://www.oracle.com/pls/topic/lookup?ctx=en/cloud/paas/apex&id=GSADD-GUID-0425E60F-E315-4B5F-9A60-08217C3CAA02)
    
*   [Sign Up for Oracle APEX on Oracle Cloud](https://www.oracle.com/pls/topic/lookup?ctx=en/cloud/paas/apex&id=GSADD-GUID-A3012716-E3E8-42A7-A4AB-0D9FFBB9825B)
    

### Explore APEX Service

*   [Sign Up for APEX Service](https://www.oracle.com/pls/topic/lookup?ctx=en/cloud/paas/apex&id=GSADD-GUID-A3012716-E3E8-42A7-A4AB-0D9FFBB9825B)
    
*   [Access APEX Service](https://www.oracle.com/pls/topic/lookup?ctx=en/cloud/paas/apex&id=GSADD-GUID-3F68C5DB-0762-4E79-A547-D3F4CCDEB437)
    
*   [Access APEX Service Components](https://www.oracle.com/pls/topic/lookup?ctx=en/cloud/paas/apex&id=GSADD-GUID-21716144-73D1-48CB-A125-7B7D16516EAF)
    
*   [Manage APEX Service](https://www.oracle.com/pls/topic/lookup?ctx=en/cloud/paas/apex&id=GSADD-GUID-F4865307-12ED-4A4B-8A19-43954EE0216A)
    

### Get Started with Oracle APEX

Oracle APEX provides you with all the tools you need to build apps in a single, extensible platform, which runs as a part of Oracle Database. Discover the benefits Oracle APEX has to offer and how you can start building superior apps today.

*   [Find Oracle APEX Resources](https://docs.oracle.com/en/database/oracle/apex/index.html)
    

### Get a Free Trial or Subscribe

Before you begin using APEX in Oracle Cloud, you must have an OCI account with access to an OCI tenancy. If your organization has a sales agreement with Oracle, start by contacting your organization’s OCI administrator to request access.

If you are an individual user, consider signing up for [Oracle Cloud Free Tier](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/free/)
. This provides a free non-expiring OCI tenancy and account, plus a free allocation of Cloud Credits to start with. These credits can be spent on paid OCI services including APEX Service during an initial trial period.

Begin the signup process by reviewing [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Free Tier](https://docs.cloud.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/FreeTier/freetier.htm)
. Then, start your signup here [https://signup.oraclecloud.com/](https://signup.oraclecloud.com/)
.

[Back to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/paas/apex/index.html#)

1.  [Home](https://docs.oracle.com/index.html)
    
2.  [Cloud](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/index.html)
    
3.  [Cloud Infrastructure](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/iaas/index.html)
    
4.  [Verrazzano](https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/iaas/verrazzano/index.html)
    

Verrazzano Enterprise Container Platform
========================================

Verrazzano is an end-to-end enterprise container platform for deploying cloud-native and traditional applications in multicloud and hybrid environments. It is made up of a curated set of open source components – many that you may already use and trust, and some that were written specifically to pull together all of the pieces that make Verrazzano a cohesive and easy to use platform.

**Note:**  
Premier Support for Oracle Verrazzano Enterprise Container Platform will end on October 31, 2024, as documented at https://www.oracle.com/us/assets/lifetime-support-middleware-069163.pdf. After that date, Oracle Verrazzano will remain in Sustaining Support indefinitely. There will be no further releases, updates, or fixes.  
For more details, see My Oracle Support Note 2794708.1.

Release 1.7 (Current) Release 1.6 Release 1.5 Release 1.4 Release 1.3 Release 1.2 Release 1.1

# Oracle WebCenter - WebCenter

[Go to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en/middleware/webcenter/index.html#)

 Search

1.  [Home](https://docs.oracle.com/index.html)
    
2.  [Middleware](https://docs.oracle.com/en/middleware/index.html)
    
3.  [WebCenter](https://docs.oracle.com/en/middleware/webcenter/index.html)
    

Oracle WebCenter
================

Oracle WebCenter is the center of engagement for business powering exceptional experiences for customers, partners, and employees. It connects people, processes, and information with the most complete portfolio of portal, content management, Web experience management, and collaboration technologies.

# Billing and Cost Management

### [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Documentation](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/home.htm)

* * *

All Pages

[Skip to main content](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/home.htm#dcoc-content-body)

Billing and Cost Management
===========================

Use the OCI billing and cost management tools to help you manage the cost of OCI services.

[What's new](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/releasenotes/services/billing/)

#### Get Started

[Video: Overview](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=amF1q1BdtSM)

[Learn about FinOps](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/FinOps.htm "Use the Console's Cost Management FinOps Hub to get an overall view of the most common cost management features, and as the central location for cost management resources in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure.")

[Check your balance](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Concepts/console_topic-AccountCenter-Billing.htm)

[Learn about billing and cost management](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/billingoverview.htm "Oracle Cloud Infrastructure provides various billing and cost management tools that make it easy to manage your service costs. You can estimate costs, create budgets to set spending thresholds, view cost reports, and visualize your spending with charts and reports. View your subscription details, invoices, usage statements, payment history, manage your payment method, and earn rewards.")

[Learn about dashboard widgets](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/dashboards-billing-widgets.htm "You can use Console Dashboards to get a quick view of billing and cost management information in your tenancy.")

[Learn about centralized cost management](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/organization_management_overview.htm#organization_management_cost_reporting)

#### Account Upgrades and Payment Method

[Learn about upgrading your free account](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/changingpaymentmethod.htm#Upgrade)

[Upgrade to Pay As You Go](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/changingpaymentmethod.htm#To_upgrade_to_PayasYouGo)

[Request a sales call](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/changingpaymentmethod.htm#To_request_a_sales_call)

[Change your payment method](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/changingpaymentmethod.htm#To_change_your_payment_method)

#### Billing

[View subscription information](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/subscriptions.htm "The Subscriptions page provides subscriptions detail, usage information, billing schedule, and information.")

[View applications subscriptions usage](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/applications_subscriptions.htm#subscription_appusage)

[View invoices](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/invoices.htm "Use the Invoices page to track and monitor your Oracle Universal Credits invoice activity.")

[View usage statements](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/usagestatements.htm "Use the Usage Statements page to view monthly statements of your subscription usage in Oracle Cloud.")

[View payment history](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/paymenthistory.htm "Use the Payment History page to track and monitor your Oracle Cloud Infrastructure paid invoice history. Only paid invoices are shown, in contrast to the Invoices page, which shows all invoices.")

[View subscription details and costs by subscription](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/costanalysisoverview.htm#viewing_subscription_details "Tenancies can view their subscription details, depending on the type of tenancy. You can also use the Subscription ID grouping dimension to view costs in terms of a tenancy's subscription.")

[Cancel a subscription](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/cancel-subscription.htm "You can cancel your subscription by filing a support request.")

#### Budgets

[Learn about budgets](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/budgetsoverview.htm "Use budgets to set soft limits on your Oracle Cloud Infrastructure spending. You can set alerts on your budget to let you know when you might exceed your budget, and you can view all your budgets and spending from one single place in the Console.")

[Create a budget](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/create-budget.htm "Create a budget to set soft limits on infrastructure spending in Billing and Cost Management.")

[Manage budget alert rules](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/managingalertrules.htm "View and manage budget alert rules in Billing and Cost Management.")

[Create a budget alert rule](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/create-alert-rule.htm "Create an alert rule for a budget in Billing and Cost Management.")

#### Cost Analysis

[Learn about cost analysis](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/costanalysisoverview.htm "Cost Analysis is an easy-to-use visualization tool to help you track and optimize your Oracle Cloud Infrastructure spending. You can generate charts, and download accurate, reliable tabular reports of aggregated cost data on your Oracle Cloud Infrastructure consumption.")

[Visualize cost data](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/costanalysisoverview.htm#Viewing_and_Working_with_the_Chart_Data)

[View query history](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/costanalysisoverview.htm#costanalysisoverview_topic-View_Query_History)

[Learn about filters](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/costanalysisoverview.htm#Filters)
 and [grouping dimensions](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/costanalysisoverview.htm#groupingdimension)

[Save reports](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/costanalysisoverview.htm#saving_reports "Use the Report actions menu in Cost Analysis to create a saved report. You can later access the report after leaving the Console and returning to Cost Analysis, without needing to respecify your set of dates, filters, granularity, or grouping dimensions. After a report has been saved, it can later be renamed, updated, or deleted. A maximum of 10 reports can be saved.")

[Forecast costs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/costanalysisoverview.htm#forecasting_costs "You can use Cost Analysis to estimate future usage and consumption information, based on past usage data.")

#### Cost Reports

[Learn about cost reports](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/costusagereportsoverview.htm "Cost reports are comma-separated value (CSV) files and reflect the cost of resource consumption. They're generated daily and are stored in an Object Storage bucket. Use the Cost and Usage Reports page to download and access the reports.")

[FOCUS and OCI proprietary cost reports](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/costusagereportsoverview.htm#costreports)

[Download reports](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/download-cost-usage-report.htm "Download a cost report in Billing and Cost Management.")

[Learn about scheduled reports](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/scheduledreportoverview.htm "You can generate scheduled reports based on saved reports from Cost Analysis.")

#### Cost Anomaly Detection

[Learn about cost anomaly detection](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/costanomalydetectionoverview.htm "Cost anomaly detection continuously monitors the daily cloud cost and informs you of abnormal usage trends. It minimizes the detection time and negative cost impacts. Cost anomaly alerts proactively notify you about anomaly events. For each detected event, cost anomaly insights help reduce the investigation and remediation efforts by providing thorough root cause analysis.")

[Create a cost monitor](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/create-cost-monitor.htm "Create a custom cost monitor to analyze cloud spending based on your selected filters, such as compartment, region, or service.")

[View cost anomalies](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/list-cost-anomaly.htm "Get a list of cost anomalies in Billing and Cost Management. The cost anomaly detection algorithm is evaluated daily for each cost monitor. When a cost anomaly is detected it's added to the list of cost anomalies.")

[Create a notification group](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/create-notification-groups.htm "Create a notification group to include all the email recipients who receive notifications when a cost anomaly's alert threshold is exceeded.")

#### Community

[Oracle Cloud Infrastructure blog](https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/)

[Cloud infrastructure community forum](https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/domain/dev-community/category/15686-platform?tags=cloud-applications,cloud-infrastructure)

#### Oracle Support Rewards

[Learn about rewards](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/supportrewardsoverview.htm "With Oracle Support Rewards, you can earn rewards when using Oracle Cloud Infrastructure services, and those rewards can be applied to pay for support contracts that customers have for other eligible on-premises Oracle products.")

[View the rewards summary](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/list-rewards-monthly-reward-summary.htm "List the rewards for a subscription ID.")

[View the redemption code](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/viewing-redemption-code.htm "Customers need a redemption code to apply accrued rewards toward support invoices in the Billing Center system.")

[Manage rewards users](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/create-redeemable-user.htm "Add a user who is authorized to redeem rewards for a subscription ID, based on their email address.")

[Redeem rewards](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Tasks/redeem_rewards.htm "Learn about redeeming Oracle Support Rewards.")

#### Troubleshooting

[Identify a resource that's consuming costs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/costanalysisoverview.htm#identifying_resource_consume_costs)

[Use grouping dimensions to identify costs](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Billing/Concepts/costanalysisoverview.htm#groupby_service-sku_proddescrip_id_costs)

#### Developer Tools: APIs

[API for Cost Analysis, and Cost and Usage Reports](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/usage/)

[API for Budgets](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/budgets/)

[API for Oracle Support Rewards](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/api/#/en/usage-proxy/)

#### Support

[Support Requests](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/GSG/Tasks/contactingsupport.htm)

[Create a service request](https://support.oracle.com/)

---

Visual Builder Studio
=====================

Oracle Visual Builder Studio brings you all the functionality previously available with Oracle Developer Cloud Service and Oracle Visual Builder, along with the ability to extend certain Oracle Cloud Applications to customize the UI for your business needs.
